page_metadata.biotools__summary: Ergo is a C++ program for all-electron Hartree–Fock and Kohn–Sham density functional theory electronic structure calculations using Gaussian basis sets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Ergo is a C++ program for all-electron Hartree–Fock and Kohn–Sham density functional theory electronic structure calculations using Gaussian basis sets.
